title: That no one is without filth and without sin.

source.title: ANF05. Fathers of the Third Century: Hippolytus, Cyprian, Caius, Novatian, Appendix

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That no one is without filth and without sin.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Job: “For who is pure from filth?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Not one; even if his life be of one day on the earth.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the fiftieth Psalm: “Behold, I was conceived in iniquities, and in sins hath my mother conceived me.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Epistle of John: “If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.”
